message:
feat(web): app-level orchestration with motion policy integration

Updates to app entry points and providers for better initialization,
motion policy enforcement, and WASM loading:

App.tsx:
- Integrated motion policy constraints into app shell
- Background FX now respect getEffectiveBackgroundEffects() from store
- Added HeavyFxRuntimeConstraints detection on mount
- Matrix rain and CRT overlay gated by runtime constraints
- Narrow viewport detection for background effect suppression
- Better coordination between store preferences and runtime conditions
- Improved layout orchestration for overlay stack

main.tsx:
- Enhanced viewport initialization for mobile devices
- Added meta viewport with interactive-widget=resizes-content
- Improved PWA manifest handling
- Better error boundary setup
- Added motion preference detection on startup
- ServiceWorker registration improvements
- Cleaner React 19 createRoot setup

wasm-loader.ts:
- Improved WASM initialization with better caching
- Module-level promise caching to prevent duplicate loads
- Better error handling for WASM init failures
- SIMD detection with graceful fallback to baseline
- Cleaner async/await patterns
- Added initialization status tracking

ScrollProvider.tsx:
- Minor cleanup for Lenis scroll context
- Better integration with overlay system (pause scroll on overlay)

These changes ensure:
1. Motion policy is enforced from the very first render
2. WASM loads reliably with proper caching
3. Background effects respect all runtime constraints
4. App shell coordinates properly with overlay stack
5. Mobile viewport behaves correctly with virtual keyboards

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
